problem_statement: SWEWS-style world substrate replay can provide sparse-cache truth, legal geometry, replay probe, branch quarantine, and planner/executor parity evidence, but the control plane needs a witness-only boundary before accepting any world replay evidence as governance proof.
success_criteria: WorldSubstrateReplayWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

WorldSubstrateReplayWitness binds world snapshot digest refs, replay trace digest refs, sparse-cache truth refs, legal geometry refs, field derivation refs, invariant registry refs, branch quarantine refs, replay probe refs, planner/executor parity refs, UAO refs, LifeMeaningJudgment refs, SimulationReceipt refs, EffectAssurance refs, WorldState refs, and SDLC recovery refs

WorldSubstrateReplayWitness blocks live world service calls, SQLite reads, SQLite writes, world mutation, replay execution, planner execution, executor execution, branch unquarantine, external endpoint calls, secret access, filesystem writes, raw world snapshot storage, raw replay trace storage, terminal closure, and success claims

WorldSubstrateReplayWitness rejects authority drift, raw payload retention, digest and scope drift, missing invariant controls, parity drift, receipt ref drift, missing evidence refs, and summary count drift
WorldSubstrateReplayWitness is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: world snapshot, replay trace, sparse-cache, invariant registry, legal geometry, branch quarantine, planner trace, executor trace, and parity evidence remain digest refs
sparse-cache truth, legal geometry, invariant registry, planner/executor parity, and branch quarantine refs must be declared
live service calls, SQLite access, replay execution, mutation, external endpoints, writes, and terminal closure remain false
